tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: South Africa Reaches World Cup Knockout Round for the First Time in History
stories.summary: Thapelo Maseko's 63rd-minute goal sends Bafana Bafana to their first-ever World Cup knockout stage, ending a 52-year national dream.

stories.headline: White Sox Welcome Miracle League Players With Special Needs to Major League Field
stories.summary: Young athletes with disabilities experience the pure joy of playing baseball on a professional field surrounded by cheering players.

stories.headline: Thai Villagers Restore Seagrass, Bring Dugongs Back From the Brink
stories.summary: Thai villagers on Koh Libong restore seagrass meadows, bringing dugongs back from the brink to help 3,000 residents reclaim their fishing livelihoods.

stories.headline: Two 13-Year-Old Boys Rescue Elderly Woman After 15+ Hours Outside
stories.summary: Quick-thinking teenagers find their neighbor who'd fallen and immediately bring her to safety, showing compassion beyond their years.

stories.headline: Woman Creates 'Wind Phone' to Help Neighbors Grieve and Heal
stories.summary: After losing both parents, a Rhode Island woman built a peaceful booth where grieving neighbors can speak to their loved ones.

stories.headline: Quilters Stitch 13 'Comfort Quilts' to Soothe Paramedics' Young Patients
stories.summary: The Stone Bridge Quilters, 25 women strong for 26 years, donate 13 handmade quilts to comfort frightened children during ambulance rides.

stories.headline: Lincoln Barber Trades Haircuts for Diapers, Cuts Free for Autistic Children
stories.summary: Barber Sam Dov trades haircuts for diapers, aiming to collect $10,000 worth to help Lincoln families afford childcare.

stories.headline: Endangered Cape Gannet Takes Flight After Rescue and Care
stories.summary: A weak Cape Gannet found on a KwaZulu-Natal beach returns to the wild after weeks of care from C.R.O.W., South Africa's oldest rehabilitation centre.

stories.headline: Kyle Schwarber Stuns Nationals With Miraculous Ninth-Inning Comeback
stories.summary: Kyle Schwarber's gritty walk and Derek Hill's home run deliver a stunning 5-4 Phillies victory against Washington with two outs in the ninth.

stories.headline: Tamil Nadu's Forest Revival Welcomes Elephants and Deer Back Home
stories.summary: Tamil Nadu's restoration of 40,000 hectares of forest—clearing nearly 31,000 of invasive lantana—welcomes elephants and deer back home.

stories.headline: Norwegian Scientists Develop Smart Pill That Heals Ulcers More Safely
stories.summary: A shape-memory capsule delivers targeted antibiotics directly to ulcer sites for 48 hours, reducing side effects and resistance.

stories.headline: Battery-Free Solar Fuel Device Self-Adjusts to Keep Energy Flowing
stories.summary: Osaka engineers created an artificial photosynthesis system with no batteries that automatically adapts to sunlight for clean energy.
